title: Connection lost after upgrade to n8n 1.98.1 with Nginx
symptom: After upgrading to n8n 1.98.1, the editor shows 'Connection lost' immediately after loading. API calls fail silently without visible errors in logs.
root_cause: The error occurs because the Nginx configuration does not support WebSocket connections, which are required for the n8n editor to maintain a persistent connection. Without proper WebSocket handling, the connection is lost after the initial load.
fix_steps: Add WebSocket support to the Nginx configuration by including the following lines: 'proxy_http_version 1.1;', 'proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;', 'proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";'.
Disable caching and buffering by adding: 'chunked_transfer_encoding off;', 'proxy_buffering off;', 'proxy_cache off;'.
Restart the Nginx service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the Nginx configuration to support WebSockets and restart the service.
